title: Tal vs Hecht
intro: In this game, watch for control of the squares around the kings and the creation and removal of hanging pieces. Tactical opportunities will arise as pieces move, creating threats and potential captures.
summary: The pressure around the kings evolved significantly as both sides made tactical moves. White's king advanced to g3, while black's king maneuvered to c4 and later d3. Captures and checks created new threats and hanging pieces, leading to a dynamic endgame.
